title: 3D DESIGNER
description:
3D DESIGNER

[Responsibilities]

  • Responsible for conceptualizing and designing 3D visuals and deliverable of compelling 3D render.
  • Applying appropriate textures, materials, and lighting to the 3D models to achieve a realistic and visually appealing representation of the exhibition space. Generating high-quality rendered images for presentations and marketing materials.
  • Proficient in space planning, 3D perspective, elevation plans, detailed drawings and visual presentation.
  • Collaborating with client servicing team on project requirements and to research on project relevance and creative contributions
  • Propose design solutions that exceed client briefs and push creative boundaries.
  • To update and modify revision of drawings as require.

[Requirements]

  • Bachelor's degree in Interior Design, Exhibition/Event Design, or related field.
  • 3-5 years in relevant experience.
  • Familiarity in Event Industrial.
  • Proficient in 3D Studio Max, Autocad, SketchUp, Adobe Photoshop and Adobe Illustrator.
  • Independent and responsible individual able to handle multiple projects and manage deadlines.
  • Good communication and presentation skills.

Please send your resume to hr@icatcher.com.sg or whatsapp +6584110438 Mr William.

postedCompany.description:
Established in 2013, Icatcher Productions is the partner of choice for one-stop events support services that delivers high quality services with superior workmanship for our clients.


Our specialty in conceptualisation, planning, design, fabrication and professional installation services have been achieved with a robust team of experienced talents, carpenters, designers and installation specialists. We strive to deliver and transform creative concepts and ideas into reality that exceed all expectations with great immersive experience for clients and guests attending experiential events and shows.


Our main core of business activities involves design, construction and installation of events props and fixtures including turnkey events venue set-up. Specialties comprising of conference and seminar backdrop, exhibition stands, roadshow display booths, festive decorations, customised props, electrical and mechanical launch mechanism, light boxes, standees and entrance arch structures. We are also capable of providing event props support services and set up in overseas events covering Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, Indonesia and Japan.


We have in-house carpentry workshops situated in Singapore and Malaysia Johor Bahru as well as steel fabrication factory under our sister company Sin Lee Heng Iron Works Awning Pte Ltd.


Through the years, our dedicated team have worked closely with numerous clients across various industries including marketing and advertising agencies, show planners, event management companies, tradeshows organisers and hotel event managers.


You will be working with a Young and Fast-Growing Company that actively striving to expand business outreach in the MICE and Events Industry.  We welcome you to join our Team!
postedCompany.name: ICATCHER PRODUCTIONS PTE. LTD.
